concept: Arrange a turn-based scenario where you direct a troupe of sentient shadow puppets that can only exist on illuminated surfaces. Strategically position light sources to create pathways and battlefields for your fragile paper champions to navigate and conquer. Acquire legendary silhouettes from different cultural traditions, each with unique abilities activated through specific shadow-casting techniques. Reclaim the ancient theater from corrupted shadows that have escaped their stories and now threaten to plunge the world into formless darkness.
